title: Multiple Catch Clause Flow
description: A flowchart showing how a try block's exception is handled by the first matching catch clause, demonstrating the order of evaluation.
elements: Try Block (Code that may throw exceptions)
relationships: Exception thrown in Try Block is compared sequentially to each Catch Clause's parameter type until a match is found; the first matching Catch Clause executes its code, then control passes to the Finally Block if present
